visual_logic: A lone figure in a hall of mirrors whose reflections show only crowds of mutually connected people — never the figure itself. Structural peripherality made inevitable and inescapable by the geometry of the space.
prompt: A lone dark featureless silhouette stands in an infinite corridor. Every framed panel on the walls contains dense luminous orbital systems — clusters of glowing spheres gravitationally bound to each other in tight constellations, orbiting one another, interconnected by faint threads of light. No human figures inside any frame. The silhouette is singular and unbound, surrounded on all sides by systems of mutual entanglement it cannot enter. Deep chiaroscuro, oil painting style, dramatic warm glow from within the frames against cold dark corridor. No text. No people inside frames. --ar 3:4 --style raw --stylize 300
